findings.location: 複数画面に跨る画面遷移時のwindowScopePrefixes属性の指定方法 — Actionクラスの実装例 (doRW11AC0301)
findings.description: The Action class for `doRW11AC0301` (一覧照会画面→更新画面) is entirely omitted. This method demonstrates a critical implementation pattern: (1) validating the primary key passed from the list screen using `ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest` with the `"selectUserInfo"` group, (2) fetching update-target data via `CM311AC1Component` (selectSystemAccount, selectUsers, selectPermissionUnit, selectUgroup), (3) creating a form object via `getWindowScopeObject`, and (4) placing the result into request scope with `ctx.setRequestScopedVar("W11AC03", form)`. This shows that the initial data load for the update screen is done explicitly via request scope — not window scope — and window scope then carries it automatically for subsequent transitions. Without this, an AI cannot correctly explain the full implementation pattern for multi-screen transitions.
findings.source_evidence: public HttpResponse doRW11AC0301(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx) { ValidationContext<W11AC03Form> userSearchFormContext = ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("W11AC03", W11AC03Form.class, req, "selectUserInfo"); ... W11AC03Form form = getWindowScopeObject(sysAcct, users, permissionUnit, ugroup); ctx.setRequestScopedVar("W11AC03", form); return new HttpResponse("/ss11AC/W11AC0301.jsp"); }

findings.location: 複数画面に跨る画面遷移時のwindowScopePrefixes属性の指定方法 — Actionクラスの実装例 (doRW11AC0302)
findings.description: The Action class for `doRW11AC0302` (更新画面→更新確認画面) is omitted. It shows that after validation the method simply forwards to the confirmation screen without explicitly setting window scope data, demonstrating that window scope handles data propagation automatically.
findings.source_evidence: public HttpResponse doRW11AC0302(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx) { ValidationContext<W11AC03Form> formContext = ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("W11AC03", W11AC03Form.class, req, "updateUser"); return new HttpResponse("/ss11AC/W11AC0302.jsp"); }

findings.description: The source contains 3 distinct RST subsections (=== level) — `windowScopePrefixes属性の使用方法`, `複数画面に跨る画面遷移時のwindowScopePrefixes属性の指定方法`, `アクションの実装方法` — each with substantial content (multiple code examples, well over 2000 characters combined). The knowledge file maps all of this to a single section `s1`. Each subsection warrants its own index entry and section ID for finer retrieval.

Several PascalCase class names referenced in the source code examples are absent from the hints: `SqlResultSet` (used in the omitted doRW11AC0301 action and relevant to data fetching patterns), `CM311AC1Component` (component class used for data retrieval), and `getWindowScopeObject` (helper method for form construction from query results). These are class/method names an AI would need to associate with window scope implementation.
findings.source_evidence: SqlResultSet sysAcct = comp.selectSystemAccount(userId); ... CM311AC1Component comp = new CM311AC1Component(); ... W11AC03Form form = getWindowScopeObject(sysAcct, users, permissionUnit, ugroup);
